disclaimer.title: Welcome to Lumina
disclaimer.body: Lumina is a creative wellness companion, not a medical device. It does not replace professional therapy or crisis intervention.
disclaimer.crisisNote: If you are in crisis, please reach out to a mental health professional or crisis line.

privacy.title: Your Privacy
privacy.body: Lumina stores only your companion's name and progress on your device. No data is ever sent to any server. No accounts. No analytics. No ads.
privacy.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete your companion and all progress. Are you sure?

crisisResources.title: Need support?
crisisResources.subtitle: You are not alone. Free, confidential help is available.
